headline: Medtronic: Expectations Are Low And That's The Opportunity
summary: Medtronic is rated a Buy, seeing limited downside and gradual upside from consistent execution and incremental margin gains. Read more on MDT stock here.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Edwards Lifesciences, Raises Price Target to $110
summary: Barclays  analyst Matt Miksic   maintains Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $104 to $110.
